analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet highlights an online meeting with the ROK ambassador and praises China–ROK mutual assistance during COVID-19 as an excellent example of international cooperation. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no mention or contrast with the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Yes; the tweet underscores China's cooperative stance and mutual aid in an international context, framing China as a constructive partner in global health efforts. CH3 (epic history) – Not relevant. CH4 (appropriate political system/values, domestic focus) – Not addressed; the tweet is international-facing. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – Not claimed; no domestic achievement or governance success is highlighted. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
